steps.title: Match the corresponding vertices
steps.content: The similar quadrilaterals are named in corresponding order. Since $P$, $Q$, and $R$ match $W$, $X$, and $Y$, the remaining vertices must match too: $S$ corresponds to $Z$.

steps.title: Use corresponding angles
steps.content: Corresponding angles in similar polygons have equal measures. Since angle $Z$ corresponds to angle $S$, its measure is $120^\circ$. The answer is D.
